data.title: McEwen Inc. and Golden Lake Exploration Inc. Announce Closing of Arrangement
data.description: In Toronto and Vancouver, BC on April 30, 2026, McEwen Inc. ("McEwen") (NYSE/TSX:MUX) and Golden Lake Exploration Inc. ("Golden Lake") (CSE: GLM) (OTCQB: GOLXF) have successfully finalized their merger through a statutory plan of arrangement. This strategic business combination between the two companies marks a significant milestone for both entities and their stakeholders.

data.title: FRONTERA ANNOUNCES RESULTS OF SPECIAL SHAREHOLDER MEETING
data.description: Shareholders of Frontera have given the green light for the arrangement with Parex, with the return of capital agreement set to be finalized by the second quarter of 2026. This move will see Frontera transition into a standalone infrastructure entity. The approval signals a significant development for the company in Calgary, Alberta, announced on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Li Auto Inc. April 2026 Delivery Update
data.description: Li Auto Inc., a prominent player in China's new energy vehicle sector, reported the delivery of 34,085 vehicles in April 2026. The company's total deliveries as of April 30, 2026, amounted to 1,669,442 units. Li Auto is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LI and on HKEX as 2015.

data.title: UWMC Issues Open Letter to Two Harbors Stockholders Detailing New $12 Per Share Offer
data.description: In Pontiac, Michigan and New York, UWM Holdings Corporation ("UWMC") (NYSE: UWMC) has recently released an open letter directed towards the stockholders of Two Harbors Investment Corp. ("Two Harbors") (NYSE: TWO). The letter emphasizes UWMC's new offer of $12 per share, highlighting its superiority over Two Harbors' planned deal with CrossCountry. Additionally, it criticizes Two Harbors' Board and management for not prioritizing the shareholders' interests and implementing certain strategies that may not benefit them.
